full_text:
Wang Fu 王甫
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Fu (王甫). Accused Prince Li of treason after receiving no bribe. Accused Empress Song of witchcraft. Wang Fu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wang Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
